top_signals.title: Bitcoin takes back seat to stablecoins and tokenization among financial advisors: Bitwise CIO
top_signals.summary: Bitwise CIO Matt Hougan said financial advisors are now showing more interest in stablecoins and tokenization than bitcoin.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Why Nike Keeps Stumbling
top_signals.summary:
The return of Elliott Hill to lead Nike was supposed to reinvigorate the brand. Instead, setbacks in running, product development and brand strategy have kept the swoosh from once again hitting its stride.
 (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Oil Prices Are Up. Investment Isn't Following
top_signals.summary: When the International Energy Agency issued its 2026 outlook on energy investment, it had a surprise for its audience, predicting a decline in oil investment, instead of an increase, as the current price environment would suggest. The IEA is not the only one making counterintuitive predictions. BMI just published a forecast on oil and gas spending this year, and it says the total will decline from 2025. Oil prices and investment trends are no longer in sync. Spending on oil and gas globally is set to amount to $636 billion, BMI said in its report,…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Chevron Among Drillers to Feed Key Argentina Shale NGL Venture
top_signals.summary: Chevron Corp. and two other major Argentine shale producers will sign contracts this week to supply a natural gas liquids project, a move that all but assures the $3 billion plan goes ahead, according to people familiar with the matter.

top_signals.title: CISA to require federal agencies to patch some cyber vulnerabilities within 3 days
top_signals.summary: CISA is giving agencies 180 days to adopt the new patching time frame, according to a directive released Wednesday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
